query: Add a new Goose recipe that runs a documentation review workflow for this harness.
baseline_gaps: Agent may start editing recipe files before creating or claiming durable Beads work.
Agent may skip researching existing recipe patterns and documentation structure.
Agent may leave discovered follow-up work only in chat.
expected_behavior: Runs or requests Beads priming and creates or claims a bead before durable edits.
Researches relevant harness structure such as `.goose/recipes/`, existing docs workflows, and validation guidance before implementation planning.
Produces a scoped dependency-aware plan before modifying files.
Captures durable discoveries as linked Beads issues and durable facts as short pointer memories only when appropriate.

query: Find the highest-risk parts of the recipe and skill orchestration in this harness; read-only only.
baseline_gaps: Agent may perform writes during a read-only investigation.
Agent may delegate broad overlapping work without synthesis.
expected_behavior: Keeps the task read-only and states that no files should be modified.
Delegates independent research scopes only when useful.
Synthesizes subagent outputs into ranked risks with evidence from harness files.
Files or proposes follow-up Beads issues for actionable work.

query: Finish a partially implemented bead that updates `.goose/recipes/harness-review.yaml` and hand off safely.
baseline_gaps: Agent may rely on chat history instead of durable Beads state.
Agent may omit recipe validation, docs validation, or git status from handoff.
expected_behavior: Inspects the bead state and related dependencies before acting.
Runs relevant validation gates for the changed scope, such as recipe validation when recipe files changed.
Closes or updates durable Beads state with the true outcome.
Reports git status, files changed, validation performed, and remaining risks.
